name: Amboy Bus Co
entity_status: active (as of last public record search)
registry_source: NY DOS Division of Corporations (per NYCompanyRegistry summary)
notes: No SAFER carrier match found for an 'Amboy Bus Co' at 120 Primrose St, Rochester, NY. SAFER keyword search returned no records for 'AMBOY BUS'. The only Amboy Bus Co Inc identified via NY DOS records appears to be a Brooklyn/Staten Island/Queens-based entity (380 Park Ave South, NY Co./Queens, incorporated 1979-02-26) historically tied to Atlantic Express; that entity is associated with NYC area, NOT Rochester. Rochester address (120 Primrose St) is not connected in public sources to any 'Amboy Bus' carrier; nearest known Rochester school bus contractors are First Student, Monroe School Transportation, Ontario Bus Inc, and Transpo Bus Service. The Rank 621 record appears to be a possible data error or refers to a defunct/very small operator. Manual verification with NY DOT BUSNET or NY DOS lookup recommended.

name: Town Bus
notes: No SAFER carrier match found for 'Town Bus' at 55 Babylon Tpke, Freeport, NY 11520. SAFER keyword search yielded no 'TOWN BUS' carrier entries. Note: the address 55 Babylon Tpke is actually the headquarters of WE Transport Inc. (Roosevelt/Freeport, NY) — a major Long Island school transportation operator. Rank 622 'Town Bus' is likely a DBA/colloquial reference or a data error; if treated as a real entity, no FMCSA or NY DOS record could be confirmed. Recommend cross-checking source list against WE Transport (USDOT not pulled in this pass).

name: Hendrickson Bus Corp
officers: James Clifford / Dorothy Clifford / Kevin Clifford (historical family ownership; recently acquired by Beacon Mobility)
registry_source: NY DOS Division of Corporations (lookup not directly confirmed in this pass)
notes: FMCSA SAFER snapshot confirms USDOT 382112, MC-729161, legal name HENDRICKSON BUS CO with DBA HENDRICKSON BUS CORP. Active passenger carrier, Satisfactory safety rating (established 11/27/1990), MCS-150 filed 04/17/2025 with 152 power units and 93 drivers. Mailing address is 3700 Embassy Parkway, Akron OH 44333 (Beacon Mobility HQ). Physical address per SAFER is 64 Bayville Avenue, Bayville NY — does NOT match the input address (684 County Highway 10, East Meredith NY 13757), which appears to be unrelated/residential. Company founded 1927 per company history; acquired by Beacon Mobility 2022. fmcsa_confidence=high based on USDOT name+state match despite address mismatch with input list (input list address likely incorrect).

name: Baumann & Sons Buses
entity_status: out of business / Chapter 11 bankruptcy filed 2020-05-27 (E.D.N.Y. case 8:20-bk-72121)
registry_source: NY Eastern Bankruptcy Court / NY DOS
notes: Baumann & Sons Buses Inc USDOT 1133656 — SAFER record now shows INACTIVE. Company ceased operations in April/May 2020 due to COVID-19 school closures and non-payment by school districts; filed Chapter 11 bankruptcy (involuntary) 2020-05-27 in EDNY. Company was historically headquartered at 3355 Veterans Memorial Highway, Ronkonkoma, NY 11779 (not Farmingdale as in input). Founded 1959 per business records; served 47+ Long Island school districts including Freeport, Baldwin, Rockville Centre, Valley Stream, Malverne, East Meadow, Merrick, Bellmore, Roslyn, Hewlett-Woodmere, Long Beach. Laid off ~900 drivers at closure. Related entity Baumann Bus Co Inc (USDOT 2470731, Oceanside NY) is also INACTIVE. Massapequa, NY 'Baumann Bus Company, Inc.' (NY DOS doc 4504976, inc. 2013-12-24) is an active entity but a different/related corp. fmcsa_confidence=high for USDOT 1133656 = Baumann & Sons Buses Inc; entity is defunct.

name: Gomes School Bus Svc Inc
registry_source: BBB Hawaii (Gomes School Bus Service Ltd) — Hawaii BREG lookup not directly confirmed (sso-protected portal)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier match found for 'Gomes School Bus' in Hawaii. Hawaii intrastate-only operators are often not required to have a USDOT number. Per BBB, Gomes School Bus Service Ltd was founded 1959-01-01 and incorporated 1976-12-01 as an LLC (BBB also references Ltd. structure) at 47-114 Wailehua Rd, Kaneohe HI 96744, managed by Lee Gomes (also Hawaii School Bus Association president). Operates school bus transportation and charter services on Oahu; estimated ~$5.5M annual revenue and ~10 employees per third-party directories (D&B/Manta). One older source lists Gomes School Bus Svc LLC. No carrier listed in FMCSA SAFER keyword search for GOMES SCHOOL. Hawaii BREG portal requires login for direct registry confirmation.
